evidence_span: Reduced butyrate-synthetic capacity was found in patients with active and inactive CD [p < 0.001 and p < 0.01, respectively]
notes: Direct observation in cohort of 71 CD patients vs 75 controls; BCoAT gene quantification by qPCR

evidence_span: Reduced butyrate-synthetic capacity was found in patients with... only in active UC [p < 0.05]
notes: Active UC only (n=58); reduced butyrate synthesis capacity via BCoAT gene content

evidence_span: Reduced BCoAT gene content in patients with CD was linked with a different regimen characterised by lower dietary fibre
notes: Inverse relationship: lower fibre intake associated with reduced butyrate synthesis capacity in CD patients
